name: natural-progression
description: Play a fresh Power-15 route with real cooldowns through training, Boxing Fist, concrete, and a hidden wall-egg pet drop, then validate all ten tier gates in an isolated boundary matrix.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{DailyQuestDate=os.date('!%Y-%m-%d')}) local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-400)) local initialPower=p.leaderstats.Power.Value local testMode=p:GetAttribute('StudioHighPowerTestMode')==true local firstBroken,firstCoins=0,0 local starterPowerStable=true for i=1,4 do local result=c:Invoke('PunchWithCooldown') if i==1 then firstBroken=result.brokenCount or 0 firstCoins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value end starterPowerStable=starterPowerStable and p.leaderstats.Power.Value==initialPower task.wait(1.02) end local preBuyCoins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value local preBuyDepth=p.leaderstats.Depth.Value local preBuyLevel=p.leaderstats.WallLevel.Value local buy=c:Invoke('BuyFist','Boxing Glove') local afterBuyCoins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value local trainingStart=p.leaderstats.Power.Value local training=c:Invoke('Train','Power Bag') task.wait(13.2) local stopped=c:Invoke('StopTraining') local trainedPower=p.leaderstats.Power.Value local combatPower=trainedPower local routeBreaks,concreteHits=0,0 for layer=math.max(1,p.leaderstats.Depth.Value+1),9 do for attempt=1,20 do local result=c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=layer,column=6,row=1}) if layer==9 then concreteHits=attempt end if result.ok and result.outcome=='broken' then routeBreaks+=1 break end end end local powerAfterWalls=p.leaderstats.Power.Value local coinsBeforePet=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value local depthBeforePet=p.leaderstats.Depth.Value local pet=c:Invoke('ForcePetEggDrop',depthBeforePet) local petMultiplier=p.RPGStats.PetMultiplier.Value local trainingGain=trainedPower-trainingStart local valid=initialPower==15 and not testMode and firstBroken>=1 and firstCoins>0 and starterPowerStable and preBuyCoins>=180 and preBuyDepth>=1 and preBuyLevel>=3 and buy.ok and p.RPGStats.FistMultiplier.Value==1.8 and afterBuyCoins==preBuyCoins-180 and training.ok and stopped.ok and trainingGain>=52 and powerAfterWalls==combatPower and depthBeforePet>=9 and routeBreaks>=1 and concreteHits>1 and pet.ok and pet.dropped and petMultiplier>0 return H:JSONEncode({initialPower=initialPower,testMode=testMode,firstBroken=firstBroken,firstCoins=firstCoins,starterPowerStable=starterPowerStable,preBuyCoins=preBuyCoins,preBuyDepth=preBuyDepth,preBuyLevel=preBuyLevel,buyOk=buy.ok,afterBuyCoins=afterBuyCoins,fistMultiplier=p.RPGStats.FistMultiplier.Value,trainingStarted=training.ok,trainingStopped=stopped.ok,trainingGain=trainingGain,trainedPower=trainedPower,powerAfterWalls=powerAfterWalls,routeBreaks=routeBreaks,concreteHits=concreteHits,depthBeforePet=depthBeforePet,coinsBeforePet=coinsBeforePet,petOk=pet.ok,petDropped=pet.dropped,petMultiplier=petMultiplier,valid=valid})

steps.label: fresh player reaches concrete and discovers a hidden wall pet

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local G=require(game.ReplicatedStorage.GameConfig) local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local monotonicHP,monotonicLevel,monotonicReward=true,true,true local gatePass,breakPass=0,0 c:Invoke('ResetWorld') for tier,w in ipairs(G.Walls) do if tier>1 then local prev=G.Walls[tier-1] monotonicHP=monotonicHP and w.hp>prev.hp monotonicLevel=monotonicLevel and w.level>prev.level monotonicReward=monotonicReward and w.coins>prev.coins end c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=1e15,WallLevel=math.max(0,w.level-1),CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,FistMastery=1,Rebirths=0}) if tier>1 then local gated=c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=(tier-1)*8+1,column=6,row=1}) if gated.reason=='level_gate' then gatePass+=1 end end c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=tier==1 and 15 or w.hp,WallLevel=w.level,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,FistMastery=1,Rebirths=0}) local result=c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=(tier-1)*8+1,column=6,row=1}) if result.ok and result.outcome=='broken' then breakPass+=1 end end c:Invoke('ResetWorld') local valid=#G.Walls==10 and monotonicHP and monotonicLevel and monotonicReward and gatePass==9 and breakPass==10 return H:JSONEncode({tiers=#G.Walls,monotonicHP=monotonicHP,monotonicLevel=monotonicLevel,monotonicReward=monotonicReward,gatePass=gatePass,breakPass=breakPass,valid=valid})
